description: Mexican criminal organization founded in 2015 by Rafael Caro Quintero and Miguel Caro Quintero, based in Sonora. It is involved in drug trafficking, particularly fentanyl and methamphetamine, and operates primarily in the border municipality of Caborca. The group is in conflict with Los Chapitos and La Mayiza over territory and drug routes. Despite the arrest of its founder in 2022, the organization remains active under new leadership.

country_links.evidence_quote: la organización juega un papel importante en el trasiego de fentanilo hacía los Estados Unidos.
country_links.context: The organization plays an important role in trafficking fentanyl to the United States.
